member.name: T:Prime.Services
member.summary: he entry point for all Prime services.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.ConsoleService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Console Service. Handles printing messages to the console window.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.DatalogService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Datalog Service. Handles printing messages to the datalog.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.FileService
member.summary: Gets or sets the File Service. Handles all the file access related.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.DtsProcessingService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Thermal Service. Handles Thermal controller functionalities.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.TestConditionService
member.summary: Gets or sets the TestCondition Service. Handles the access to the test conditions (timings/levels).

member.name: P:Prime.Services.TesterService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Tester Service. Handles tester HW access - mainly I2C.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PatternService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pattern Service. Handles everything related to read/write from a pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.TpSettingsService
member.summary: Gets or sets the TpSettings Service. Handles the generic settings of the TP to configure the RTL execution.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.UserVarService
member.summary: Gets or sets the UserVar Service. Handles everything related with read/write to uservars.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.DcService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dc Service. Handles DC tests executions.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PinService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pin Service. Handles the setup of a pin for execution.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.SharedStorageService
member.summary: Gets or sets the SharedStorage Service. Handles single place to store shared data for the whole library.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.TestProgramService
member.summary: Gets or sets the TestProgram Service. Handles TestProgram items.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.FuseDBService
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseDB Service. Handles the FuseDef structure.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.BinMatrixService
member.summary: Gets or sets the BinMatrix Service. Handles the BinMatrix structure.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PlistService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Plist Service. Handles the setting of a plist.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.BinCounterService
member.summary: Gets or sets the BinCounter Service. Handles the bin and counter capabilities.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.BinTraceService
member.summary: Gets or sets the BinTrace Service. Handles the BinTrace capabilities.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.ThreadAlignmentService
member.summary: Gets or sets the TimeUnderStress Service. Handles the TimeUnderStress user variables.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.MultiTrialService
member.summary: Gets or sets the MultiTrial Service. Handles the MultiTrial user variables.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.CallbacksService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Callbacks Service. Handles the per dieId bin tracking.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.FuseManagerService
member.summary: Gets or sets the FuseManager Service. Handles the Fuse Data (currently only Virtual Fuse) management.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.DffService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dff Service. Handles interactions with DFFs.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.ThermalControlSetService
member.summary: Gets or sets the ThermalCs Service. Handles ThermalCs controller functionalities.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.ThermalService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Thermal Service. Handles Thermal controller functionalities.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PowerPremonitionResponseService
member.summary: Gets or sets the PowerPremonitionResponse Service. Handles Thermal compensation methodology.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.FunctionalService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Functional Service. Handles func tests execution.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.VoltageService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Voltage Service. Handles the setting voltage on the units.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PatConfigService
member.summary: Gets or sets the PatConfigreTracking Service. Handles all the pattern modify and fuse config in the library.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PupService
member.summary: Gets or sets the PUP Service. Handles the PUP methodology.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.VminForwardingService
member.summary: Gets or sets the VminForwarding Service. Handles the VminForwarding capabilities.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.SimbaService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Simba Service. Handles the hooks to activate Simba.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.TimeUnderStressService
member.summary: Gets or sets the TimeUnderStress Service. Handles the TimeUnderStress user variables.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PinMonitorService
member.summary: Gets or sets the PinMonitor Service. Handles the pin(s) to be monitor.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.DieIdBinningService
member.summary: Gets or sets the DieId Service. Handles the per dieId bin tracking.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PlatformService
member.summary: Gets or sets the PlatformService Service. Handles the direct calls to TOS APIs.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.PerformanceService
member.summary: Gets or sets the PerformanceService Service. Handles the performance profiling related capabilities.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.SessionService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Session Service. Handles the SessionContext per thread.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.DefeatureTrackingService
member.summary: Gets or sets the DefeatureTracking Service. Handles the tracking structures to track whether specific elements of a die are featured/defeatured for the purposes of recovery methodologies.

member.name: P:Prime.Services.ConcurrentTestService
member.summary: Gets or sets the Concurrent Test Service. Handles the Concurrent Test methodologies.
